title: Action Recorder UX: Launch with Record menu in profile info dialog + auto-save recording on browser kill
description: Add UX improvements to action recorder: (1) 'Launch with Record' menu item in profile info dialog (similar to 'Launch with Sync'), (2) auto-save recording when browser is killed to prevent data loss, (3) prominent REC indicator, (4) proper i18n keys for all 7 locales
close_reason: Shipped: Launch with Record menu, kill auto-save (frontend+backend), REC name badge, i18n, integration tests; verification + review fixes passed

comments.text: Shipped UX: Launch with Record menu, kill auto-save (frontend+backend), REC name badge, i18n, tests. Commits: 0c73392, 405a78f, b16aa4b. Gates green.

title: Auto-reg dual network: Nord CLI IP rotate every N successes OR static proxy
description: Dual-mode network for ChatGPT auto-registration: when Nord mode is active, use NordVPN Windows CLI (NordVPN.exe -c/-d) to rotate system egress IP every N successful free-trial accounts; when proxy mode is selected, use existing static proxy_id. Includes RegistrationConfig fields, engine success-counter hook, IP verify via ip_utils::fetch_public_ip, UI mode toggle + rotateEveryN, i18n 7 locales, docs update. Out of scope: WireGuard Nord export, concurrent multi-browser Nord, proxy pool multi-hop.
close_reason: Shipped: dual network Nord CLI rotate every N successes OR static proxy; commit 2ce73f5; pre-commit clippy+lib tests green; 6/6 PRD tasks pass

title: Auto-login Stored inventory table: selection + status chips + export selected/all-available
description: Separate Stored inventory table (mirror registered-accounts-table): checkbox selection, status chips (available/exported/used/invalid), export selected or all available/success only (no silent re-export), mark-exported only after successful file save. Sub2API JSON format already fixed.
close_reason: Stored inventory table: selection + status chips + export selected/available + mark-after-save. Verified tsc, biome, cargo store tests.

title: CDK inventory picker + top-up mode: remaining visibility, Continue/Top-up, dialog picker, clamp accountsPerCdk
description: Implement Option C from exploration: CDK Stats shows remaining capacity; Continue/Top-up action; registration dialog can pick an existing partial CDK row; accountsPerCdk clamped to remaining; preserve history on continue (no delete required). Engine already supports retry-cap via cdk_remaining_capacity + reserve_cdk_slots_per.
